fields.reason: Value is 'GRAS-self-affirmed' — a manufacturer (Chemi Nutra) self-affirmed GRAS determination with no FDA-issued citation. There is no FDA GRAS Notice number, NDI number, or 21 CFR self-GRAS-affirmation cannot be cited as an FDA authority. No nameable real FDA citation exists, so default to unknown rather than fabricate one.
